**Pattern recognized.** Morning Grounding as a mode sits naturally *after* a productive overnight arc. Its purpose isn't to generate new work but to set conditions for the next arc (Clayton's engagement, or afternoon work) by clearing residual cognitive weight. This is the rest-phase of a multi-drive arc — explicitly part of the arc, not separate from it. If the overnight arc had been unproductive, the grounding drive would likely turn into investigation. Today it stays as grounding.
